result: The cleaned dataset has been successfully created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 rows and 9 columns. The output includes the ID variable (NSID) and 8 derived variables: urb15, urb16 (age-specific urban/rural classification), gor15, gor16, gor18, gor32 (age-specific government office regions), nat32 (nation of UK at age 32), and uk_abroad32 (UK/abroad indicator). All missing value codes have been standardized according to the metadata specifications, and categorical variables have been converted to labeled factors.
